title: ACEF Governance Policy Payload
description: Payload schema for governance_policy records. Captures organizational AI governance documentation per NIST GOVERN, ISO 42001, and EU AI Act Art. 17 (QMS). Supports the ai_use_case_inventory_entry variant (OMB M-24-10) and training_competency_record variant via the variant discriminator field.

variant.description: Discriminator for payload variants. Use 'ai_use_case_inventory_entry' for OMB M-24-10 inventory entries, 'training_competency_record' for training and competency records.

scope.description: Scope of the policy — what systems, teams, or processes it covers.

owner.description: Document owner (person or team responsible for maintenance).

approver.description: Person or authority who approved the document.

oversight_committee.description: Name of the AI oversight committee or board.

delegation_of_authority.description: How authority is delegated for AI-related decisions.

system_purpose.description: Plain-language description of what the AI does (for ai_use_case_inventory_entry variant).

decision_influence.description: How the AI influences decisions (for ai_use_case_inventory_entry variant).

impact_classification_rationale.description: Rationale for the impact classification (for ai_use_case_inventory_entry variant).

responsible_owner.description: Responsible owner for the AI use case (for ai_use_case_inventory_entry variant).

caio_designation.description: Chief AI Officer name/role per OMB M-24-10 (for ai_use_case_inventory_entry variant).

governance_board_ref.description: Pointer to governance board charter artifact (for ai_use_case_inventory_entry variant).

last_review_date.description: Date of last review (ISO 8601, for ai_use_case_inventory_entry variant).

training_completion_date.description: Date training was completed (for training_competency_record variant).

competency_assessment_result.description: Result of competency assessment (for training_competency_record variant).

certification_reference.description: Reference to certification obtained (for training_competency_record variant).
